last_assistant_message:
## Task Complete

**Task**: #12 - Write Tests & Implement Workflow Engine (MS-07)
**Status**: Completed

**Test Results**: 92/92 unit tests passing across 3 test suites

**What was done**:
- Created complete NestJS service at `src/services/workflow-engine/`
- Prisma schema with 5 models: Workflow, WorkflowStep, ApprovalAction, Delegation, AuditLog
- Full approval routing per PRD Section 7.1 (all 10+ change types: auto-approve, 1/2/3/4-level chains)
- Workflow lifecycle: create, approve, reject, send-back, resubmit, bulk-approve
- Delegation system with date ranges and change type scoping
- Complete audit trail (F5.7)
- Seed data for 13 workflow types
- 7 DTO classes with class-validator decorations

**Files changed**:
- 25+ files created under `src/services/workflow-engine/`

**Verification**: `npx jest --no-cache --forceExit test/unit/` — 92 passed, 0 failed

Task #25 is complete. The available unblocked pending tasks are:
- **#27** — Implement Real-time Policy Validation (F9) — no blocker, no owner

Waiting for team lead assignment.

## Task Complete

**Task**: Write Tests & Implement Quick Approve Hub (F8)
**Status**: Completed

**What was done**:
- Added `bulkReject` service method with same pattern as `bulkApprove`
- Added max 50 item validation on both `bulkApprove` and `bulkReject`
- Enhanced `getPendingForUser` with filters: `change_type`, `urgency` (high/medium/low mapped to approval levels), `date_from`/`date_to`
- Added `getWorkflowPreview` for slide-over panel (returns workflow + audit trail)
- Added 3 new controller endpoints: `POST /bulk-reject`, `GET /:id/preview`, `GET /pending` with query filters
- Wrote 16 new tests (11 service + 5 controller)

**Files changed**:
- `src/workflow/workflow.service.ts` — 4 new features
- `src/workflow/workflow.controller.ts` — 3 new endpoints + Query import
- `test/unit/workflow.service.spec.ts` — 11 new tests
- `test/unit/workflow.controller.spec.ts` — 5 new tests

**Verification**: 86 tests passed, 0 failed (2 test suites)

## Task Complete

**Task**: #25 - Write Tests & Implement Quick Approve Hub (F8)
**Status**: Completed

**What was done**:
- Wrote 54 tests across 2 test files (service + controller) covering all F8 requirements
- Implemented QuickApproveService with pending aggregation, urgency calculation, bulk approve/reject, slide-over detail, and delegation CRUD
- Implemented QuickApproveController with REST endpoints and RBAC guards
- Created 4 DTOs: PendingFilterDto, BulkApproveDto, BulkRejectDto, CreateQuickDelegationDto
- Added ApprovalDelegation model to Prisma schema
- Registered QuickApproveModule in AppModule

**Files created**:
- `src/quick-approve/quick-approve.service.ts` — Full service implementation
- `src/quick-approve/quick-approve.service.spec.ts` — 35 service tests
- `src/quick-approve/quick-approve.controller.ts` — REST endpoints with Roles guard
- `src/quick-approve/quick-approve.controller.spec.ts` — 19 controller tests
- `src/quick-approve/quick-approve.module.ts` — Module registration
- `src/quick-approve/dto/*.ts` — 4 DTOs

**Files modified**:
- `prisma/schema.prisma` — Added ApprovalDelegation model
- `src/app.module.ts` — Imported QuickApproveModule

**Test counts**: 54 new + 109 existing = **163 unit tests passing** (all 5 unit test suites green)

Both tasks complete. Remaining unblocked pending tasks: **#24** (Implement Smart Claims Frontend — now unblocked since #23 completed). Waiting for team lead assignment.

## Task Complete

**Task**: Implement Real-time Policy Validation (F9)
**Status**: Completed

**What was done**:
- Added `PolicyRule` Prisma model with hard/soft rule types and condition operators
- Implemented `PolicyValidationService` with leave, overtime, and claims validation
- Hard rules block submission; soft rules allow with justification requirement
- Created validation endpoints: `POST /leave/validate`, `POST /overtime/validate`, `POST /benefits/claims/validate`
- Created PolicyRule CRUD (HR Manager only): `POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /policy-rules`
- Wrote 30 tests (21 service + 9 controller)

**Files changed**:
- `prisma/schema.prisma` — added PolicyRule model
- `src/policy-validation/policy-validation.service.ts` — validation logic
- `src/policy-validation/policy-validation.controller.ts` — REST endpoints
- `src/policy-validation/policy-validation.module.ts` — module registration
- `src/app.module.ts` — added PolicyValidationModule
- `test/unit/policy-validation.service.spec.ts` — 21 tests
- `test/unit/policy-validation.controller.spec.ts` — 9 tests

**Verification**: 139 unit tests passed, 0 failed (5 suites)

ผลเทส:

## Backend Services

| Service | Result | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| manager-self-service | **57/57 passed** | All green |
| employee-center | **64/71 passed** | 7 failed = integration tests (ต้องมี PostgreSQL) |
| workflow-engine | **193/201 passed** | 8 failed = integration tests (ต้องมี PostgreSQL) |

## Frontend (Next.js)

| Type | Result | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Unit tests (vitest) | **38/38 passed** | All green |
| E2E specs (playwright) | 16 files failed to collect | Playwright version conflict กับ vitest — ไม่กระทบ unit tests |

**สรุป:**
- Unit tests ทั้ง frontend + backend ผ่านหมด
- ที่ fail เป็น integration tests ที่ต้องมี PostgreSQL database running (expected)
- E2E tests ต้องรันแยกด้วย `npx playwright test` ไม่ใช่ผ่าน vitest

จะให้รัน E2E tests แยกด้วย Playwright ไหมครับ?
